HomeDestinationsChatakpur
West Bengal

Chatakpur

The Eco-Village in the Clouds

Village floating above the clouds, where every morning begins with a sea of mist below your feet.

4.4
(67 reviews)
Darjeeling, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
18°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

About Chatakpur

Chatakpur is a model eco-village offering stunning views of Mt. Kanchenjunga, surrounded by dense forests and rare orchids.

Established as a community-led eco-tourism initiative by the forest department and local villagers.

mountainsnatureculturetrekkingphotography

Quick Facts

Altitude
2,100 m
Weather
Pleasant throughout the year
Best Time
October to May
Rating
4.4 (67 reviews)
Ideal For
Solo, Couples, Families, Seniors
